params.name: Carothers Nylon
params.description:
On Feb 5, 1928 AD, Carothers' team successfully synthesized nylon.
Carothers stumbled upon a white fiber with remarkable strength and elasticity while researching polymers in the residues from a previous experiment. He later led a team to produce it, resulting in the invention of nylon. This breakthrough material marked a major advance in the synthetic fiber industry and greatly impacted the textile industry.
